verses.text: Hih pen kamsang Habakkuk tungah Topa in maangmuhna sungah a gen thu ahi hi
Topa aw, bang tanvei huhna hong ngen ding a, hong zaloin om niloh ding na hi hiam? Gimna thuak ung, ci-in bang tanvei hong kiko ding a, hong honloin om niloh ding na hi hiam
Bang hangin hih bang siatnate leh lungkhamnate hong musak na hi hiam? Kisuksiatna leh kisukgawpna in hong umcih a, kitotna leh kiselna, mun citengah om hi
Thukham in thu neizo loin a mawkna suak a, thu a manin kisem ngeilo hi. Thutang thute kilehhei-in, migilote in thuman mite zo zawsop hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Khaldea Mite in Judah Mite Gim Pia Ding

verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in a mite kiangah thu gen a, “No, a thumanlo ka minamte aw, na kiim uha a om minam dangte en dih un; lamdang na sa mahmah ding uh hi. Note kiangah thu hong kigen ciangin na up zawh hetloh ding uh thu lamdang khat tu-in a bawl ding ka hi hi
A omkhong theilo, a kihtakhuai Khaldea mite, a vang ka liansak ding a, leitung khempeuhah amaute pai-in gam khempeuh a zo mangkhin ding uh hi
Amaute lauhuai-in, kihtakhuai mahmah uh a, a gen khempeuh uh nial theih hilo hi

“A sakolte uh kamkei sangin tai hatzaw a, keivom gilkial sangin kihtakhuai zaw hi. Gamlapi pek panin a sakol tung tuangte hong kipan uh a, a sakolte un lei-ah a khe phut uh hi. Muvanlai in sa a bawh bangin a galte a leen'lak uh hi
“A susiagawp dingin hong kuankhia uh a, a sukkhak ding uh mi khempeuh lau mahmah uh hi. A galmatte uh tam mahmah a, sehnel zahin kisim zolo hi
Kumpite, simmawhbawl uh a, uliante nuihsan lel uh hi. Kulh muan'huaite zong nuihsan lel uh a, a kulhpua-ah lei sungvumin tua tung tawnin khuapi a la uh hi
Tua ciangin huihnung bangin paisuak uh a, amau' hatna bek a suang uh hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Habakkuk in A Lungkimlohna Thu Topa tungah Gen

verses.text: Topa aw, a cil peka kipan a tawntungin Pasian na hi a, nang pen a tawntungin keima Pasian, a Siangtho Pa na hi hi. Topa aw, kote gim a hong pia dingin amaute na seh hi bek hi. Ka belh Suangpi aw, kote nong thuhilhna ding bekin amaute' tungah vang a pia bek na hi hi

Ahi zongin hih a gilo a zuautat mite bangci thuakzawh na hi hiam? Hih bang siatna a mu dingin na mit siangtho lua a, a gamtatsia mite na thuakzo kei hi. Tua ahih manin amaute sangin a dikzaw mite a suksiatna-ah bang hangin daicip na hi hiam
Bang hangin tuipi ngasa bang lelin mihingte bawl a, a uk ding a omlo ganhing note bangin omsak na hi hiam
Amaute in ngasa mat bangin sikkawi tawh mite man uh a, a ngen uh tawh khuhin manin a ngenpi uh tawh kaikhia a, tua bangin a matna hangun lungdamin a awng uh hi
A ngente un amau' deih peuhpeuh ngahsak ahih manin, amaute in a ngente uh bia-in biakpiakna zong a pia uh hi
Amaute in a namsau uh zangin, hehpihna mel neiloin mi that ding ahi uh hiam?
